versions.version_description: Changed the chords to a version I saw on YouTube which sounded quite good based on a cover done by Jeremy Passion & Tori Kelly. Might not be the exact correct chords but they seem to work. Happy for feedback if some amendments required. Cheers.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[1st Verse]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                     [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'm young but I'm wise enough to know[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#[/ch]                       [ch]A#m[/ch]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
That you don't fall in love overnight, oh yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#m[/ch]
That's why I thought if I took my time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#[/ch]                     [ch]A#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m[/ch]
That everything in love would be right[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D#m[/ch]      [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
But as soon as I closed my eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G#m[/ch]       [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]D#m[/ch]
I was saying to love, "Goodbye"[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
But I guess I'm lonely[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]
Brokenhearted[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]A#m[/ch]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
Life's not over I can start again[/tab]
[tab]D3m        [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
While I'm lonely brokenhearted[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]       [ch]F#[/ch]                [ch]A#m[/ch]  [ch]D#m[/ch]
It's a hurting thing to get over[/tab]

[2nd Verse]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]
No more empty conversations[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#[/ch]                       [ch]A#m[/ch]    [ch]D#m[/ch]
Next time I will be totally sure, oh yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]                                    [ch]C#m[/ch]
Don't want the pain of falling in and out of love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#[/ch]                      [ch]A#m[/ch]      [ch]D#m[/ch]
It's more than my poor heart should endure[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A#m[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
So I'll listen to all advice[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]                  [ch]D#m[/ch]
And remember each time I cry[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
That I guess I'm lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Brokenhearted[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#[/ch]         [ch]A#m[/ch]    [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch]
Life's not over I can start again[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G#m[/ch]      [ch]C#m[/ch]
While I'm lonely, brokenhearted[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#[/ch]                   [ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch]
It's a hurting thing to get over[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
Brokenhearted[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]A#m[/ch]  [ch]D#m[/ch]
Life's not over I can start again[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G#m[/ch]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
While I'm lonely, brokenhearted[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#[/ch]                 [ch]A#m[/ch]                [ch]D#m[/ch]
It's a hurting thing to get over (Starting all over again, oh)[/tab]

[ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch]
[ch]G#m[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch]
